name: CulturalDay2025 On Saturday, June 28th, 2025,
snippet:
✨ GIRAU INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL CULTURAL DAY 2025 ✨   #CelebratingDiversity | #ProudlyNigerian | #CulturalDay2025. On Saturday, June 28th, 2025, ...
Our students, teachers, and parents proudly showcased the beauty and uniqueness of Igbo, Yoruba, Nupe, Hausa, Igala, and Kanuri cultures — from traditional attire and delicious cuisine, to captivating dances, language, and storytelling. It was a spectacular display of unity in diversity! 🎭🥁🎉.

name: #traditionaldaycelebration - TikTok
snippet: Sixth Form students were encouraged to wear traditional cultural dress to celebrate their heritage, or to wear items of clothing or jewellery to represent a cultural group that they belong to for 'Culture Day'.
